title: Buttery Juicy Slovakian Dried White Beans Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix low-calorie-friendly dish featuring tenderized dried white beans cooked in a flavorful buttery sauce with garlic and bell peppers.
instructions: Rinse the dried white beans under cold water.
Place the rinsed beans in a pot with enough water to cover them by about 1 inch. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for about an hour or until tender (check seasoning periodically).
While beans are cooking, heat butter in a pan over medium-high heat. Add garlic and bell pepper; stir-fry until slightly softened.
Once the beans are done, drain them well and transfer them into the pan with the vegetables.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste. Stir everything together for 1-2 minutes or until fully combined.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
